# @agent-os/agent-authoring Public API

Status: 0.5.x experimental for compiling authored agent trees into manifest/provenance facts. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

## Public exports

- `.:AUTHORING_DEFAULTS_VERSION`
- `.:AgentManifestFactKey`
- `.:AgentManifestOrigin`
- `.:AuthoredAgentJson`
- `.:AuthoredAgentManifest`
- `.:AuthoredAgentTree`
- `.:AuthoredAgentTreeFile`
- `.:AuthoredJsonFile`
- `.:AuthoredMarkdownFile`
- `.:AuthoredToolDeclaration`
- `.:AuthoredToolEffect`
- `.:AuthoredToolFile`
- `.:CompileAgentTreeIssue`
- `.:CompileAgentTreeResult`
- `.:CompiledAgentManifest`
- `.:compileAgentTree`

## Experimental exports

None.

## Deprecated exports

None.

## Internal-only exports

Any package file or symbol not listed above.
